methods.method_name: Microprobe EDS Analysis and Mean Calculation
methods.description: Process for analyzing bone fragments using microprobe EDS and calculating mean values to represent the sample.

steps.description: Several microprobe EDS analyses were made at various locations on individual bone fragments.
steps.searchable_summary: perform EDS analysis on bone fragments

steps.description: Calculated the mean values as being representative of the sample.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate mean values from EDS data

methods.description: Comparison of chemical contents using the non-parametric Mann-Whitney test for small sample sizes.

steps.description: Comparison of chemical contents was estimated using the non-parametric Mann-Whitney test, at α = 5%.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Mann-Whitney test on chemical contents

methods.description: Multivariate analyses using principal component analyses based on correlation matrices to moderate statistical weights of elements with high concentrations.

steps.description: Multivariate analyses (principal component analyses) were based on correlation matrices.
Statistical weights of elements with high concentrations (i.e., Ca) were moderated within the software (Statgraphics XVI).
